pattern: MOSFET current-mirror group: diode-connected reference + output FETs sharing gate and source rail (one reference fans out to many outputs, as in op-amps)
note: two-part model. I->V: vt off the rail + a sense resistor (1 ohm when the reference is the smallest device) turn the reference current into an overdrive voltage. V->I: each output sources (size_i/size_min)*overdrive, going resistive near the rail via tanh so it cannot pass the supply. size ratios come from the netlist W/L; vt, vsat are tuned.
